title: watch.rs matches_pattern allocates on every check
description:
src/watch.rs:116 — Inside matches_pattern:

    return file_name.ends_with(&format!(".{ext}"));

This allocates a String for every file event just to check a suffix. Use:

    file_name.ends_with(ext) && file_name.as_bytes().get(file_name.len() - ext.len() - 1) == Some(&b'.')

Or more readably:

    file_name.rsplit_once('.').is_some_and(|(_, e)| e == ext)

Impact: Unnecessary allocation per filesystem event. Minor in practice since events are infrequent, but the fix is simpler than the current code.
